subcodes.first_line: May God grant thee, O Mahdi, such recompense from Us as hath no beginning, and We bear witness that thou didst not wrong this servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فجزاک الله یا مهدی عنا جزاء لایاخذه البدء و نشهد بانک مااذیت هذا العبد حین
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
